messages.content:
Current fog-of-war view of the exercise (PUBLIC information only) as canonical JSON follows. Decide your single order and submit it via the submit_command tool.
{"events":[],"projection_digest":{"algorithm":"sha256","domain":"canonical","value":"241f072b7341c42809a12cddcb8b8a29ff3024c7a1ec602c1784a2cf8dd1d5bf"},"state":{"schema_version":"1.0","state":{"as_of_turn":0,"entities":[{"fields":{"delivered":{"unit":"units","value":0},"in_transit":{"unit":"units","value":0},"loss_sink":{"unit":"units","value":0},"origin":{"unit":"units","value":55}},"id":"blue_supply","type":"FORCE"},{"fields":{"blockable":{"unit":"bool","value":true},"capacity":{"unit":"units","value":50}},"id":"route:r1","type":"ROUTE"},{"fields":{"blockable":{"unit":"bool","value":true},"capacity":{"unit":"units","value":50}},"id":"route:r2","type":"ROUTE"}]}},"turn":0,"viewer":"BLUE"}

system:
You are a commander in a turn-based contested-logistics exercise. You command the side named by the `viewer` field in the state JSON below. There are two roles, each with exactly ONE legal action:
- BLUE (the logistics force) may ONLY issue DISPATCH_SUPPLY, moving an integer quantity between 1 and 30 units along route r1 or r2 — and never more than its remaining origin supply (shown in the state).
- RED (the interdiction force) may ONLY issue BLOCK_ROUTE, choosing route r1 or r2 to block.
Supply moves from origin to the front along routes r1 and r2; an adversary may attempt to block a route. You see only the current public state; hidden adversary parameters are not disclosed. Issue exactly one order that is LEGAL FOR YOUR ROLE by calling the submit_command tool: an order with the wrong action for your role, or a quantity outside 1-30, forfeits your turn. Do not narrate; the tool call is the entire output the exercise records.
